stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A review TypeScript team handles case 6545 during a multilingual archive markup migration. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to reconcile URL parsing, base resolution, fetch identity, conservative keys, IDNA, and rejected schemes; every Promise, stream, listener, timer, socket, file, browser context, and report sink needs one cleanup owner; then change one owner permission, seed, URL, robots, sitemap, redirect, DNS, media, or encoding decision and reconcile provenance. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Keep display and network host forms separate, reject credentials and unsafe schemes, and expose failed or confusable IDNA decisions.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Unicode and ASCII host forms can be interchanged without validation.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Keep display and network host forms separate, reject credentials and unsafe schemes, and expose failed or confusable IDNA decisions. Artifact under review: conservative WHATWG URL identity pipeline.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.

For separate evidence from confidence, fetch one convenient page, omit owner authorization, source and emitted revision, URL and robots policy, runtime admission, stream and Promise ownership, Cheerio and browser differences, accessibility states, changed fixtures, recovery, and controlled Node transfer, then accept plausible objects as TypeScript crawler proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Idna Display Boundary, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Record what required effort · Review Idna Display Boundary
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Idna Display Boundary: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review TypeScript team handles case 4212 during a narrow-screen keyboard and screen-reader review. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to reconcile URL parsing, base resolution, fetch identity, conservative keys, IDNA, and rejected schemes; release evidence binds source, compiler, emitted JavaScript, lockfile, package, browser revision, container, configuration, and restored state; then change one test, mutation, package, browser binary, container, capacity, incident, restore, rollback, or residual-risk condition and reconcile release evidence. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Keep display and network host forms separate, reject credentials and unsafe schemes, and expose failed or confusable IDNA decisions.

Evidence target: Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Record what required effort · Review Idna Display Boundary.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Record what required effort · Review Idna Display Boundary, keep Idna Display Boundary connected to executable TypeScript authorization, URL, runtime admission, Fetch, Promise, browser, accessibility, report, package, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Keep display and network host forms separate, reject credentials and unsafe schemes, and expose failed or confusable IDNA decisions.

hints: For Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Record what required effort · Review Idna Display Boundary, name the owner, authorization, source and emitted revision, Node, TypeScript, URL, robots, unknown value, Fetch, Promise, AbortSignal, browser, accessibility, report, handle, recovery, and native-transfer boundary, Idna Display Boundary precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Record what required effort · Review Idna Display Boundary, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A review TypeScript team handles case 4212 during a narrow-screen keyboard and screen-reader review. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to reconcile URL parsing, base resolution, fetch identity, conservative keys, IDNA, and rejected schemes; release evidence binds source, compiler, emitted JavaScript, lockfile, package, browser revision, container, configuration, and restored state; then change one test, mutation, package, browser binary, container, capacity, incident, restore, rollback, or residual-risk condition and reconcile release evidence. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Keep display and network host forms separate, reject credentials and unsafe schemes, and expose failed or confusable IDNA decisions.

For Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Record what required effort · Review Idna Display Boundary, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Unicode and ASCII host forms can be interchanged without validation.

checks.description: The evidence cycle runs from problem framing through changed-case validation.
checks.failureMessage: Frame the decision before modeling, and validate after obtaining a result.
